module-UpdateHandler-UpdateHandler.html.title: UpdateHandler~UpdateHandler
module-UpdateHandler-UpdateHandler.html.name: UpdateHandler
module-UpdateHandler-UpdateHandler.html.description: Instantiate this object to register a handler

module-BackgroundApi-BackgroundApi.html.title: BackgroundApi~BackgroundApi
module-BackgroundApi-BackgroundApi.html.name: BackgroundApi
module-BackgroundApi-BackgroundApi.html.description: Instantiate new BackgroundApi() to register background API listeners which handles messaging between different parts of the extension, @see onMessage for details on message passing in chrome extensions.

module-Dragging-Dragging.html.title: Dragging~Dragging
module-Dragging-Dragging.html.name: Dragging
module-Dragging-Dragging.html.description: Create element whose children can be dragged and dropped

module-Background-Background.html.title: Background~Background
module-Background-Background.html.name: Background
module-Background-Background.html.description: Instantiate Background to bind background behavior.

module-CenteredPopup.html.title: CenteredPopup
module-CenteredPopup.html.name: CenteredPopup
module-CenteredPopup.html.description: Utility module for opening popup window in the middle of user's viewport.

module-Dragging.html.title: Dragging
module-Dragging.html.name: Dragging
module-Dragging.html.description: This module makes childNodes of some DOM Element draggble using native HTML5 drag and drop.

module-UpdateHandler.html.title: UpdateHandler
module-UpdateHandler.html.name: UpdateHandler
module-UpdateHandler.html.description: Register action that should occur on extension install or update. Instantiate this object to register a handler

module-BackgroundApi.html.title: BackgroundApi
module-BackgroundApi.html.name: BackgroundApi
module-BackgroundApi.html.description: Listen to incoming messages from other browser contexts. Instantiate new BackgroundApi() to bind this behavior.

module-ContextMenu.html.title: ContextMenu
module-ContextMenu.html.name: ContextMenu
module-ContextMenu.html.description: This module adds custom options to chrome browser action context menu (right click on extension icon next to address bar). contextMenus permissions is required inmanifest.json. Instantiate new ContextMenu() to activate this functionality.

module-RecentLinks.html.title: RecentLinks
module-RecentLinks.html.name: RecentLinks
module-RecentLinks.html.description: Recent links were used recently (based on config). They become stale after some time and then get removed from the list of recent.

module-Menu.html.title: Menu
module-Menu.html.name: Menu
module-Menu.html.description: Menu panel is a DOM elements that shows a list of links. This menu panel is drawn dynamically by creating all menu elements programmatically upon calling menuObj.render(). The parent instantiating the menu will call render. Parent must then add the returned menu to DOM tree to display it to user.

module-Background.html.title: Background
module-Background.html.name: Background
module-Background.html.description: This module is responsible for setting up all event handlers and actions that happen in the background context of the extension. This module will: initialize the message passing API sets up extension context menu bind updateHandler Instantiate new Background() to enable this functionality.

module-Popup.html.title: Popup
module-Popup.html.name: Popup
module-Popup.html.description: This is the main class for the popup window that shows when user clicks extension icon. This class is responsible for: saving/restoring persistent data and rendering the menu panel This popup view can easily be extended to display other content, but currently it renders the menu panel only.

AppConfig.html#.recentIntervalMillis.title: <static> recentIntervalMillis :number
AppConfig.html#.recentIntervalMillis.name: recentIntervalMillis
AppConfig.html#.recentIntervalMillis.description: When a link clicked within last X milliseconds, it is considered "recently used".

SVGIcons.html#.unpinnedLink.title: <static> unpinnedLink
SVGIcons.html#.unpinnedLink.name: unpinnedLink
SVGIcons.html#.unpinnedLink.description: SVG icon for an unpinned menu link

SVGIcons.html#.activePin.title: <static> activePin
SVGIcons.html#.activePin.name: activePin
SVGIcons.html#.activePin.description: SVG icon for an pinned menu link

ContextMenuOptions.html.title: ContextMenuOptions
ContextMenuOptions.html.name: ContextMenuOptions
ContextMenuOptions.html.description: List of options to display in the context menu. Links will open in new tab when width/height (ww/wh) are not specified. Otherwise links will open in a window of specified size.
